jobDescription: We are looking for a passionate and experienced Senior Email Marketing Associate. This person will be responsible for the flawless execution of campaigns for both demand and supply teams at 1stdibs. This position will support the end-to-end-operational flow for email, including support for high level operational efficiencies to move the program forward. You will own multiple email flows, including setup, audience management, QA, deployment, and reporting across multiple email service providers. You will support high level data integrations and reporting across multiple channels. You will also own the process for touch points outside of email, including direct mail, onsite chat, and push notifications. You will be detail oriented with a drive for process and passion for problem-solving, with strong time management skills. This a fantastic opportunity to join a dynamic cross-functional team environment and grow your Marketing career. What you'll do: Coordinate with various teams including design, editorial and retention to plan, QA, execute and report on email campaigns Manage multiple campaigns while adhering to tight deadlines Partner with Product and Engineering teams to update email processes and functions to allow for a more scalable process Support the Marketing Ops Manager with updates to streamline marketing campaigns Report on KPIs across channels and partner with the Analytics team when needed Execute and report on a/b and multivariate tests to drive engagement Make content recommendations based on past campaign performance Manage the process for promotional push notifications Report on campaign success to the larger team on a weekly basis Troubleshoot technical issues What you'll bring:2+ years of managing marketing operational processes Comfortable multi-tasking and juggling different projects Extremely detail oriented & well organized Strong verbal and written communication skills Strong ability to problem solve, ability to think outside the box and the desire to learn and grow within a role Team player with ability to thrive in a fast-paced and deadline-driven environment Experience in Email Marketing Experience working with datasets and Excel files Basic HTML Knowledge is a massive plus Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications or related field is a plus Preferred: Experience using Salesforce Marketing Cloud/ Exact Target Experience with Ampscript Passion for marketing, data and learning new technology Advanced skills in Excel or Google Sheets
